title: mentha longifolia var. recta
intro: Mentha longifolia var. recta, also known as wild horse mint or long-leaved mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia var. recta include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its use as a natural remedy for anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
